title: xiigen.i18n-translation.marketplace-cache-miss.v1
description: Emitted by T666 TranslationResolverService at pipeline Step 4 when the module is installed from marketplace but no master-cache entry exists. Queues T667 MarketplaceTranslationCacheJob asynchronously under MASTER_TENANT_ID CLS (CF-811). Idempotency key ensures SETNX dedup per CF-816.

tenantId.description: Tenant observing the miss (ALS). Queue job will switch CLS to MASTER_TENANT_ID internally.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale requested. Target of the async master-cache translation.

idempotencyKey.description: SETNX key per CF-816 — e.g. `marketplace-translation::${packageId}::${moduleId}::${locale}` — deduplicates concurrent misses across tenants.
